title: Server crashes when executing a window query with ordering by EXTRACT date
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE departments (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE employees (dep_id INTEGER, name TEXT, salary REAL, hire_date TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (dep_id) REFERENCES departments(id));
INSERT INTO employees (dep_id, name, salary, hire_date) VALUES (1, 'Smith', 81, '2019-08-10'), (2, 'Jones', 55, '2019-08-09'), (3, 'Williams', 55, '2019-07-14');
SELECT dep_id, name, salary, (SELECT SUM(salary) FROM employees e2 WHERE e2.hire_date <= e1.hire_date) AS salary_sum FROM employees e1 ORDER BY hire_date;
key_bug_features: Executing window query with ordering by EXTRACT date
